rulings.Case Title: 1596 CHURCH STREET CONDOMINIUMS LLC VS. THE CHURCH OF SAN FRANCISCO AKA THE CHURCH OF SAN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc And Motion To Vacate And Set Aside Order Granting Pltfs Motion For Summary Judgment And Judgment; And For Leave To File Opposition To Motion For Summ Judgment
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON THURSDAY, NOVEMBER 15, 2007, LINE 19, DEFENDANT THE CHURCH OF SAN FRANCISCO'S Motion To Vacate And Set Aside Order Granting Plaintiffs Motion For Summary Judgment And Judgment; And For Leave To File Opposition To Motion For Summary Judgment. Given the policy of the Court to hear matters on the merits where the moving party proffers a basis for failing to respond, the motion to set aside the granting of the summary judgment motion is granted and the motion is set on the Court's calendar for hearing on Nov. 21, at 9:30 a.m. =(302/PJM/VC)
